title: Bibliography & Sources
intro: The archives, publications, and records this project draws on, grouped by kind. Many are drawn from the Town of Islip Historian's Office Revolutionary War Resource Guide and its addenda. This working list grows as the research continues.

categories.sagtikos: Sagtikos Manor, Islip Grange & Local Institutions

reviewIntro: The following are usable, but should be verified against title pages, archival records, or stronger corroborating sources before final publication.
missingNote: Have a source we should add, or a correction to one here? Please get in touch through the contact page.
